items.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities

items.title: Invariant Learning Dynamics of Transformers in Inductive Reasoning Tasks
items.summary: We present a theoretical framework to explain the emergence of inductive reasoning abilities in Transformer language models. items.title: A Minimalist Retargeting-Guided Reinforcement Learning Recipe for Dexterous Manipulation
items.summary: Recent work in humanoid whole-body control has found success with a simple recipe: retarget human motion to robot kinematic references, then train policies via reinforcement learning (RL) to track them. But how does this recipe transfer to dexterous manipulation? The answer is not obvious, as manipu

items.title: Inside the Unfair Judge: A Mechanistic Interpretability Account of LLM-as-Judge Bias
items.summary: Existing studies of LLM-as-judge scoring bias work predominantly at the input-output level: they perturb inputs, measure score deltas, and propose prompt-level mitigations. We argue that the same biases admit a representation-level account in the judge's hidden state, complementary to the input-outp

items.title: Evidence-Backed Video Question Answering

Existing explainability efforts rely on textual rationales or sparse bounding boxes, which struggle to capture complex

items.title: LoRA-Based Cascaded Multimodal Fusion for Action Recognition in Medical Training Environments
items.summary: This paper presents a cascaded Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based multimodal fusion framework for action and activity recognition in healthcare-oriented training environments. The proposed architecture combines parameter-efficient modality-specific adaptation with sequential fusion, enabling modalitie

items.title: Transformer-Guided Swarm Intelligence for Frugal Neural Architecture Search

items.title: MM-ToolSandBox: A Unified Framework for Evaluating Visual Tool-Calling Agents
items.summary: We introduce MM-ToolSandBox, a benchmark and evaluation framework for visually grounded tool-calling agents. items.title: Introducing Human-Centeredness in AI-Assisted Lexicography
items.summary: This paper proposes a human-centered artificial intelligence (HCAI) framework for AI-assisted lexicography. items.title: Encoder-Side Neuron Identification and Amplification for Acoustic Perception in Large Audio-Language Models
items.summary: Large audio-language models (LALMs) often underperform on fine-grained, non-semantic attributes of speech, such as a speaker's emotion, despite strong performance on speech content. items.title: StoryTeller: Training-Free Narrative Grounding for Long-Form Audio Description
items.summary: Long-form audio description (AD) requires more than describing visible actions: it must preserve characters, events, relationships, and story context across scenes so that blind and low-vision (BLV) audiences can follow a film. Modern video-language models (VLMs) are effective on short clips, but th

items.title: Evaluating RE Practices for Explainability: Synthesizing Insights from Daimler Truck into an Explainable RE Framework Proposal
items.summary: Explainability has emerged as a critical requirement for AI-based systems, particularly in safety-critical and regulated domains. items.title: Playful AI in Professional Email: A Field Experiment on Tone and Recipient Engagement
items.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly reshaping workplace communication, yet whether AI-assisted writing changes how recipients actually behave, and through what channel, remains unknown. items.title: Time-Lag-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling in PPVC Module Factories

items.title: Active Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning

items.title: An Explainable Agentic System for Detection of Conversational Scams with Summary-Based Memory

items.summary: Modern LLM-driven text-to-speech (TTS) and voice conversion (VC) systems produce synthetic speech that differs from the generators represented in many legacy spoofing benchmarks. items.title: Think Through a Bottleneck: Hourglass Reasoning for Rigorous Induction

items.title: From World Action Models to Embodied Brains: A Roadmap for Open-World Physical Intelligence

items.title: Requential Coding: Pushing the Limits of Model Compression with Self-Generated Training Data

items.title: Input-Aware Dynamic Backdoor Attack Against Quantum Neural Networks
